prompt: I was a tiny robot in a candy-cane forest where the trees were made of licorice and a giant gummy bear guarded a singing treasure chest.
essentialMechanic: Talk or solve a short guardian interaction before opening the chest.

prompt: I was flying above an endless city made of clocks while blue whales swam through the sky and every bell changed the direction of gravity.
essentialMechanic: Fly between clock towers and activate bells that redirect movement.

prompt: A shadow followed me through my flooded school. Every door opened into the same classroom, but one detail changed each time.
essentialMechanic: Observe changes and choose the correct exit while evading the shadow.

prompt: I lived inside a porcelain teapot floating through space with three talking moons that argued about where home was.
essentialMechanic: Speak with the moons and choose or assemble a route home.

prompt: I was searching for my dog in a forest made from old photographs. The trees showed memories when I touched them.
essentialMechanic: Inspect memory trees to follow clues and reunite with the dog.

prompt: A friendly volcano asked me riddles before it would let me cross a bridge made of glass over glowing clouds.
essentialMechanic: Answer or discover clues, then cross a fragile/slippery bridge.

prompt: I was underwater but could breathe. Glowing fish were building a palace around me, and they wanted me to place the final star on its roof.
essentialMechanic: Swim/carry/place the star and complete the palace.

prompt: A giant alarm clock chased me through my childhood home. Every room became smaller until I finally turned around.
essentialMechanic: Escape through shrinking spaces, then trigger a confrontation rather than endless running.

prompt: The floor became clouds and I had to catch falling stars before the moon forgot my name.
essentialMechanic: Glide or bounce to collect stars, then restore the name to the moon.

prompt: I entered a library where every book whispered a different version of my future and one blank book followed me around.
essentialMechanic: Inspect futures and make a choice that writes the blank book.

prompt: I won the lottery and rushed home to tell my family. We gave each other ridiculous gifts and celebrated until the furniture floated into the sky.
essentialMechanic: Tell family members, choose gifts, gather everyone, and activate the celebration.

prompt: I met my late grandfather at an empty train station. We planted a tree together before his train arrived.
essentialMechanic: Gather/place symbolic pieces to plant the tree and share a final conversation.

prompt: I was the size of a coin in my kitchen. The sink was an ocean, toast was a mountain, and ants offered me a ride home.
essentialMechanic: Traverse oversized household terrain and ride/follow ants.

prompt: In my office, gravity pulled sideways whenever someone told a lie, and the meeting room drifted around the building.
essentialMechanic: Use dialogue clues and gravity zones to reach the moving meeting room.

prompt: I had to conduct an orchestra of birds on a stage made of sunrise. Every gesture painted a new part of the sky.
essentialMechanic: Perform timed interactions that transform the sky; no enemy required.

prompt: I walked through a city folded from paper while it rained ink. I had to repair umbrellas for tiny citizens before the streets dissolved.
essentialMechanic: Collect/assemble/deliver repairs before a soft timer changes the city.

prompt: A garden of mirrors grew copies of me. Each copy remembered a different thing I had forgotten.
essentialMechanic: Speak/observe/choose among copies and restore one memory to the garden.

prompt: My house floated away under thousands of balloons and I chased it across rooftops while my cat calmly watched from the chimney.
essentialMechanic: Dash/glide across rooftops and reach the moving house/cat.
